overall.description: First-person exploration through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, showcasing neon-lit streets, elevated walkways, and outdoor dining areas. The footage features high-quality game engine rendering with ray-traced reflections on wet pavement, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated pedestrian bridge overlooking the neon-lit streets below

entered.detail: elevated monorail track structure with bright pink neon lighting running overhead
tall glass office building with green neon trim and vertical lighting
modern glass skyscraper illuminated with pink neon signage
wet street intersection visible below the elevated walkway with moving vehicles
metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking a rainy neon-lit intersection. The monorail track with pink neon lighting passes overhead while glass towers with green and pink illumination rise on either side. Wet streets with sparse traffic are visible below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated corridor with digital billboard walls

events.description: approaching the end of the elevated walkway with ramp visible leading down to street level

agents.ego_description: walking along a covered elevated corridor lined with large digital billboards on the left wall

entered.detail: large curved wall covered with massive digital advertisements and neon signage
billboard displaying text about 2nd amendment with yellow lettering
teal-colored digital billboard with MILFGAU RP text and corporate logo

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered elevated corridor with massive digital billboards covering the left wall, including advertisements for MILFGAU and political messaging. The walkway narrows as it approaches a ramp descending to street level, with the monorail track now visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining plaza with neon food stalls

events.description: descends from elevated walkway to street level, entering open plaza with wet pavement
entering area dominated by bright pink and purple neon lighting from food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through an outdoor dining area, observing neon-lit food stalls and seated customers

notable_agents.action: customer sitting at high table near the pink neon bar

entered.detail: outdoor food stall with bright pink neon lighting and counter service
high-top tables with neon-lit stools arranged on the wet pavement
rain-soaked pavement reflecting the pink and blue neon lights
tall vertical light column illuminating the plaza with white light

segments.scene_description: Descending to street level into a vibrant outdoor dining plaza. The wet pavement reflects bright pink neon from food stalls where customers sit at high tables. The atmosphere is lively with scattered pedestrians and the glow of tall light pillars in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered restaurant walkway with outdoor seating

events.description: entering covered walkway area with GIRARUS restaurant and potted palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking past outdoor diners seated at the GIRARUS restaurant counter and tables

notable_agents.action: customer sitting at the restaurant counter facing the street

entered.detail: restaurant with illuminated GIRARUS signage and large glass windows
overhead covering providing shelter from the rain
large concrete planter containing palm trees and tropical vegetation

segments.scene_description: Walking under a covered walkway past the GIRARUS restaurant where customers dine at outdoor tables. The area features potted palm trees and transitions from the open plaza to a more sheltered corridor with mixed lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with palm trees and digital billboards

events.description: exiting covered walkway into large open plaza with palm trees and vertical light columns

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious plaza, looking up at the towering buildings with digital billboards

entered.detail: expansive open paved area with geometric patterns and wet reflections
tall cylindrical light pillars emitting bright white light
tall glass skyscraper covered with large digital advertisements and neon trim

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a vast open plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in digital billboards. Tall vertical light pillars illuminate the wet pavement while palm trees line the walkways. The camera moves through this spacious cyberpunk square, looking up at the massive glass facades and neon advertisements overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an elevated pedestrian walkway down into a sprawling, neon-drenched urban plaza. It begins high above a rainy intersection, moving beneath a pink-lit monorail track and between towering glass skyscrapers. As the camera enters a covered corridor, the view narrows past massive digital billboards and political advertisements before descending a ramp toward the street level. The scene then opens into a vibrant outdoor dining plaza where wet pavement reflects the glow of food stalls and light pillars, passing by the GIRARUS restaurant and sheltered walkways lined with potted palms. Finally, the movement emerges into a vast open square, looking up at towering skyscrapers and massive digital facades that dominate the rainy night sky.
